ACC.summary: The ACC is a Power Four league that carries 8.79% of national title equity across 1000 simulations. Members fill 9.47% of all playoff field slots — a meaningful slice of the 12-team bracket. Miami Hurricanes is a heavy favorite at 34.7% conference title odds. The next tier includes Louisville Cardinals (11.4%), SMU Mustangs (11.3%), Clemson Tigers (9.1%). Miami Hurricanes averages 9.45 wins and reaches the playoff field in 50.6% of simulations. Miami Hurricanes is the league's top national title threat at 4.76% championship odds, and the top three teams hold 72.6% of the conference's title equity. Schedules are demanding: member teams average +0.6 strength of schedule in the model. Stanford Cardinal brings up the rear at 4.26 average wins.
